resources.string: Your device is currently using mobile data.

For Network Notifier to function properly, you need to allow it to ignore Android\'s battery optimizations.\n\nIf you don\'t grant this permission, notifications may be delivered late and the service may stop working randomly.

On Android 13 and later, notification permissions must be granted for apps to post notifications. The app\'s service will not start until these permissions are granted.\n\nIf the \"Request Permissions\" button does not work, tap the button below it and manually enable notification permissions for Network Notifier in Settings.
Notification permissions are required for Network Notifier to function properly in the background and deliver notifications. Please allow these permissions in Settings.
Open Android Settings for this app
